ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school" TEXT /* School the student is attending */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address table */,
  "famsize" INTEGER /* Reference to the family size table */,
  "Pstatus" TEXT /* Reference to the parental status table */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Whether the student has a disability (True/False) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_backgrounds" (
  "background_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic background entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "Medu" INTEGER /* Mother's education level (0=none, 1=primary, 2=4th to 5th, 3=secondary, 4=higher education) */,
  "Fedu" INTEGER /* Father's education level (same coding as Medu) */,
  "Mjob" TEXT /* Mother's job type (e.g., at_home, health, teacher, etc.) */,
  "Fjob" TEXT /* Father's job type (same categories as Mjob) */,
  "educational_level" TEXT /* Student's current educational level (e.g., middle school, high school, college) */,
  "highest_qualification" TEXT /* Student's highest qualification (e.g., high school diploma, bachelor's degree) */,
  "previous_school" TEXT /* Student's previous school name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("background_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_backgrounds_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for attending the school (e.g., course, home, other) */,
  "influence_level" TEXT /* Level of influence of the reason (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_reasons_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guardians" (
  "guardian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guardian entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "guardian" TEXT /* Relation to the student (e.g., mother, father) */,
  "legal_drinker" INTEGER /* Whether the guardian is a legal drinker (True/False) */,
  "relation_to_student" TEXT /* Guardian's relation to the student (e.g., mother, father, grandparent) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Guardian's income level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guardian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guardians_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family size entry */,
  "famsize" TEXT /* Family size classification (GT3 or LE3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family size classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parental_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parental status entry */,
  "Pstatus" TEXT /* Parental status (T or A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parental status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drinking_habits" (
  "habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drinking habit entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "drinking_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of drinking (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "drinking_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of alcohol consumed (e.g., number of drinks per occasion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drinking_habits_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic performance entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "GPA" TEXT /* Student's grade point average */,
  "attendance_rate" TEXT /* Student's attendance rate (e.g., percentage of classes attended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
